data.description: a weapon for striking a foe at distance.
A ranged weapon with a normal range and a larger range.
The creature you choose must be within your reach and must not be behind total cover beyond your reach.
Involves making an attack with a melee weapon or unarmed strike.
A weapon's reach determines how far from you it can strike.
When a hostile creature that you can see moves out of your reach or through your space, you can use your reaction to make one melee attack against it.
A ranged attack with a fire bow.
